item.name: Tsoly Mu
item.description:
A round red freshwater fish known to inhabit the emerald waters of Iq Rrax Tsoly.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: In the Xbr'aal language, “mu” means “sun,” while “tsoly” refers to a cenote. A fitting name for this vibrant red wavekin, which is easily mistaken for a mysterious light source when spotted in the depths.
